stock_gpu.error: llama-server process has terminated: CUDA error: device kernel image is invalid

stock_cpu_fallback.error: llama-server process has terminated: signal: killed
stock_cpu_fallback.note: num_gpu=0 forces 20B MXFP4 to CPU; OOM-killed in 32GB container

heretic_gpu.error: llama-server process has terminated: CUDA error: device kernel image is invalid

root_cause: gpt-oss:20b uses MXFP4 quantization (Microscaling FP4), which requires NVIDIA Blackwell GPU (sm_100+, e.g. RTX 5000, H200 NVL). Cloud Run L4 is Ada Lovelace (sm_89). MXFP4 kernels compiled for Blackwell fail with 'device kernel image is invalid' on Ada Lovelace. svjack/gpt-oss-20b-heretic is derived from gpt-oss:20b and inherits the same MXFP4 format.
notes: Both models pulled successfully (28 GB total, ~12 min)
Ollama 0.30.5 is correct version — 0.5.7 gave 412 error
Model pull works fine; only inference requires Blackwell
For L4-compatible test: use Q4_K_M quantized models (e.g. qwen3:14b, llama3.3:70b-q4)
For MXFP4 models: Cloud Run would need H100 NVL or future Blackwell GPU tier
